// ============================================================
// CORVID 2.0 | managers/database/credential-db
// Credential record schema and operations.
// All credential types  -  system, mail, bank  -  unified
// in one schema with a type field to distinguish them.
//
// Schema:
//   id            string  -  auto-generated e.g. "c_001"
//   type          string  -  system | mail | bank
//   username      string  -  login name or email address
//   password      string  -  plaintext if cracked, else ""
//   native_pass   string  -  original password before Corvid changed it
//   hash          string  -  original hash from passwd/mail
//   bank_number   string  -  bank account number (bank type)
//   public_ip     string  -  source machine public IP
//   lan_ip        string  -  source machine LAN IP
//   org_id        string  -  linked organisation ID
//   person_id     string  -  linked person ID
//   source        string  -  native | exploit_generated | hardened | harvest_updated | mail | bounce
// ============================================================

CRED_TYPES = {}
CRED_TYPES.SYSTEM = "system"
CRED_TYPES.MAIL   = "mail"
CRED_TYPES.BANK   = "bank"

CredentialDb = {}
CredentialDb.db = null

CredentialDb.findByUsername = function(username)
    term = lower(username)
    matchUser = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("username") and lower(record.username).indexOf(term) != null
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchUser)
end function

CredentialDb.findByIp = function(ip)
    // Credentials can have multiple per IP so we still scan
    // but skip records where neither IP field matches early
    result = []
    for kv in self.db.records
        rec = kv.value
        if rec.hasIndex("public_ip") and rec.public_ip == ip then
            result.push(rec)
        else if rec.hasIndex("lan_ip") and rec.lan_ip == ip then
            result.push(rec)
        end if
    end for
    return result
end function

CredentialDb.findByType = function(credType)
    matchType = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("type") and record.type == credType
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchType)
end function

CredentialDb.findCracked = function()
    matchCracked = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("password") and record.password.len > 0
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchCracked)
end function

CredentialDb.findByOrg = function(orgId)
    matchOrg = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("org_id") and record.org_id == orgId
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchOrg)
end function

CredentialDb.search = function(term)
    term = lower(term)
    matchAny = function(record)
        if record.hasIndex("username") and lower(record.username).indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("password") and lower(record.password).indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("public_ip") and record.public_ip.indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        return false
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchAny)
end function

CredentialDb.upsert = function(data)
    // Natural key: username + public_ip + type
    if not data.hasIndex("username") then
        return Error.New("Credential requires a username", "VALIDATION_ERROR")
    end if
    if not data.hasIndex("type") then
        return Error.New("Credential requires a type (system|mail|bank)", "VALIDATION_ERROR")
    end if

    pubIp = ""
    if data.hasIndex("public_ip") then
        pubIp = data.public_ip
    end if
    credType = data.type
    username = data.username

    matchExisting = function(record)
        if record.username != username then
            return false
        end if
        if record.type     != credType then
            return false
        end if
        if record.public_ip != pubIp   then
            return false
        end if
        return true
    end function

    existing = self.db.query(@matchExisting)
    if existing.len > 0 then
        record = existing[0]
        id     = record.id
        incomingSource = ""
        if data.hasIndex("source") then
            incomingSource = data.source
        end if

        if data.hasIndex("password") and data.password.len > 0 then
            incomingPass = data.password
            existingPass = record.password

            if incomingSource == "exploit_generated" or incomingSource == "hardened" then
                // Preserve current password as native_pass before overwriting
                // Only if we don't already have a native_pass saved
                if not record.hasIndex("native_pass") or record.native_pass.len == 0 then
                    record.native_pass = existingPass
                end if
                record.password = incomingPass
                record.source   = incomingSource

            else if incomingSource == "native" or incomingSource == "harvest" then
                // Re-harvest: if password differs from stored, flag as updated
                // but don't overwrite native_pass if already set
                if existingPass.len > 0 and incomingPass != existingPass then
                    // Password changed since last visit - keep native, note update
                    if not record.hasIndex("native_pass") or record.native_pass.len == 0 then
                        record.native_pass = existingPass
                    end if
                    record.password = incomingPass
                    record.source   = "harvest_updated"
                else if existingPass.len == 0 then
                    record.password = incomingPass
                    if not record.hasIndex("source") or record.source.len == 0 or record.source == "unknown" then
                        record.source = incomingSource
                    end if
                end if

            else if incomingSource == "routerattack" or incomingSource == "routerattack_passwd" or incomingSource == "routerattack_file" then
                // Router harvest - update password, preserving native if changed
                if existingPass.len > 0 and incomingPass != existingPass then
                    if not record.hasIndex("native_pass") or record.native_pass.len == 0 then
                        record.native_pass = existingPass
                    end if
                end if
                record.password = incomingPass
                record.source   = incomingSource

            else
                // Generic update - just update if not already set
                if existingPass.len == 0 then
                    record.password = incomingPass
                end if
            end if
        end if

        if data.hasIndex("hash")        and data.hash.len        > 0 then
            record.hash        = data.hash
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("bank_number") and data.bank_number.len > 0 then
            record.bank_number = data.bank_number
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id")      and data.org_id.len      > 0 then
            record.org_id      = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("person_id")   and data.person_id.len   > 0 then
            record.person_id   = data.person_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("lan_ip")      and data.lan_ip.len      > 0 then
            record.lan_ip      = data.lan_ip
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    else
        id = self.db.nextId("c")
        record = {}
        record.id          = id
        record.type        = data.type
        record.username    = data.username
        record.password    = ""
        record.native_pass = ""
        record.hash        = ""
        record.bank_number = ""
        record.public_ip   = ""
        record.lan_ip      = ""
        record.org_id      = ""
        record.person_id   = ""
        record.source      = "native"
        if data.hasIndex("password")    then
            record.password    = data.password
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("native_pass") then
            record.native_pass = data.native_pass
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("hash")        then
            record.hash        = data.hash
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("bank_number") then
            record.bank_number = data.bank_number
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("public_ip")   then
            record.public_ip   = data.public_ip
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("lan_ip")      then
            record.lan_ip      = data.lan_ip
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id")      then
            record.org_id      = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("person_id")   then
            record.person_id   = data.person_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("source")      then
            record.source      = data.source
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    end if
end function

CredentialDb.get = function(id)
    return self.db.get(id)
end function

CredentialDb.updateRecord = function(record)
    // Direct update of a record by id - used by migration and targeted updates
    if not record.hasIndex("id") then
        return Error.New("Record missing id field", "NO_ID")
    end if
    self.db.set(record.id, record)
    return record.id
end function

CredentialDb.all = function()
    return self.db.all()
end function

CredentialDb.New = function(db)
    result    = new CredentialDb
    result.db = db
    return result
end function
